arts.ttl: Thursday’s briefing: Villa up against it after PSG loss as Matic slates Onana
arts.sum: The Europa League is back on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Man United get dream Victor Osimhen transfer update as Liam Delap advice emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United will have one eye on the summer transfer window but their current focus will be on getting a positive result at Lyon in the first leg of their Europa League quarterfinal clash

arts.ttl: Heaven, Mainoo, Amad - Manchester United injury news and return dates ahead of Lyon fixture
arts.sum: All the very latest on the Man United injury front ahead of the first leg of their Europa League quarter-final against Lyon at Parc Olympique Lyonnais.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Price of summer transfer target could drop amid Andre Onana's war of words
arts.sum: Manchester United are eyeing a new striker in the summer but recent transfer blunders are making them think twice as Andre Onana and Nemanja Matic go at it each other before the clash with Lyon

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rejects Sir Alex Ferguson theory after holding talks with Man Utd icon
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has had to deal with the fallout of Manchester United's draw in Sunday's derby but he's maintained that he cannot draw from the methods used by Sir Alex Ferguson

arts.ttl: What Cristiano Ronaldo told Man Utd about hiring Luis Enrique as manager
arts.sum: Luis Enrique was tipped for the Manchester United job in November 2021 after Ole Gunnar Solskjaer was sacked and Cristiano Ronaldo hoped that he'd come to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Lyon vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Lyon vs Man Utd in the Europa League quarter-finals on Thursday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim identifies where Kobbie Mainoo can improve his game as Man United midfielder nears comeback from injury
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Mainoo has been included in United's squad for the Europa League quarter-final clash with Lyon in France on Thursday night following a nine-week absence.

arts.ttl: Manchester United predicted XI v Lyon: Kobbie Mainoo to feature?
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo returned to first-team training for Manchester United ahead of Thursday’s visit to face Olympique Lyonnais in the quarter-finals of the UEFA Europa League. Mainoo has made the trip…

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim calls for more from Kobbie Mainoo as he makes Casemiro comparison
arts.sum: Midfielder is fit again after two months out with a muscle issue
